description: Default capability set for the main VideoDubber window. Grants: core window/event/path access; the dialog + opener plugins; the self-updater (`updater:default` for check/download/install + `process:default`/`process:allow-restart` to relaunch after install); and `shell:allow-execute`/`shell:allow-spawn` SCOPED to the bundled externalBin sidecars (orchestrator + 3 workers) so src/sidecar.rs can launch them in production. Each shell scope entry sets `sidecar:true` with a `name` matching the bundle.externalBin base name (Tauri resolves the per-target-triple binary) and `args:false` because every sidecar is configured purely via environment variables — never CLI args.
